name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 1 Oct 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version: ","bold":true},{"text":"v6.72"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Minor Features"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "},{"text":"Amazon Australia","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Amazon Australia integration has been updated to allow listing products that are fulfilled by Amazon. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You will need to map the fulfilment centre ID field in the field mapping, to a product field that contains the ID. Leave the ID field blank for products that are not fulfilled by Amazon."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" Stock levels will not be sent when the fulfilment centre ID is populated on a listing, these still need to be loaded through seller central."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true},{"text":" "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the main image was not uploaded to Catch listings."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where an error occurred when approving quotes."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the calendar didn't appear in the Payment Date field on sales orders."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
